# RWAToday.news
> Independent editorial publication covering real-world asset (RWA) tokenization, on-chain finance infrastructure, and the protocols and institutions building the tokenized economy.

## Key Pages
- /: Homepage
- /ultimate-guide-rwa-tokenization-2026: The definitive guide to RWA tokenization in 2026
- /what-is-rwa-crypto-explained: What is RWA in crypto — complete answer
- /rwa-glossary-terms-explained: RWA glossary — every term explained
- /how-to-invest-in-rwa-beginner-guide: How to participate in RWA tokenization today
